---
title: 'Archytas: A Framework for Synthesizing and Dynamically Optimizing Accelerators
  for Robotic Localization'
author:
- Weizhuang Liu
- Bo Yu
- Yiming Gan
- Qiang Liu
- Jie Tang
- Shaoshan Liu
- Yuhao Zhu
categories:
- Show All
- Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
topics:
- robotics
url_source: https://dl.acm.org/doi/pdf/10.1145/3466752.3480077
code_source: https://github.com/horizon-research/Archytas
journ: MICRO
year: 2021
contrib: Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
image: featured.png
ext_source: https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/abstract/document/9994649
pub_number: 52
---
